original_image_tags: Document page with two large punched holes on the left margin. The top classification stamp reads "CONFIDENTIAL / RESTRICTED". The bottom classification stamp reads "CONFIDENTIAL / RESTRICTED". The number ".143" is typed in the bottom right corner. The text is typed on a dark background.

elements.description: Typed document with text describing a sighting of a metallic object, along with agent notes. The words 'CONFIDENTIAL' and 'RESTRICTED' are stamped at the top and bottom of the page, both with strikethrough lines. Two black punch holes are visible on the left margin. No photographs, sketches, diagrams, or charts are present.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the key visual elements: two punched holes on the left, and the 'CONFIDENTIAL' and 'RESTRICTED' stamps at top and bottom, but Description B adds the specific detail of strikethrough lines on the stamps, which Description A omits without contradicting.
